title: Viz compose input
description: Compose a visualization schema from chart type, data bindings, and/or object viz traits. Provide at least one of 'chartType', 'object', or 'traits'.

dslVersion.description: DSL version to use for this request. Defaults to the current version (1.0).

object.description: Object name from the OODS registry. When provided, viz traits are resolved automatically to determine chart type and encodings.

traits.description: Explicit viz trait names (e.g., 'mark-bar', 'encoding-position-x'). Used when composing without an object.

chartType.description: Chart type to compose. Maps to mark traits: bar→mark-bar, line→mark-line, area→mark-area, point→mark-point.

x.description: Field name for the x-axis encoding.

y.description: Field name for the y-axis encoding.
